description: A vision science team has collected contrast sensitivity data using a 2-down/1-up adaptive staircase procedure in PEBL. Using the data at ~/pebl/data/contrast_staircase_data.csv (columns: participant_id, trial, target_contrast, response_correct, rt_ms), calculate the 70.7% contrast threshold for each participant based on staircase reversals. Reversals are defined as local maxima or minima in the chronological target_contrast sequence (excluding the first and last values) after removing consecutive duplicates. Exclude participants with fewer than 6 reversals (reason: 'Failed to converge (< 6 reversals)') or a mean RT below 150ms (reason: 'Mean RT < 150ms'). For valid participants, the
